title: DRDO DLJ Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Defence Laboratory Jodhpur (DRDO DLJ) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. DLJ/HRD/PAIDINTERNSHIP/2026/01 on the official website of DRDO. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO DLJ Paid Internship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Pursuing Graduate in Engineering / Post Graduate in Science, full time course in the respective discipline from a AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute (Final year students only)

selection_process: CGPA based selection Online interview / interaction Merit basis Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO DLJ Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO DLJ Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DRDO DLJ Paid Internship is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the stipend offered for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000 per month for the duration of the internship program. This is a fixed stipend and will be paid as per the organization's policy.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the internship?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Paid Internship at Defence Laboratory Jodhpur is 25 years. There is no mention of age relaxation for any category in the provided details.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates must be pursuing a full-time Graduate degree in Engineering or a Post Graduate degree in Science from an AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University or Institute. Only final-year students are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be made for the internship?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on CGPA, followed by an online interview or interaction. A merit list will be prepared, and document verification will be the final step.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this internship?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for this Paid Internship at DRDO DLJ.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this internship?
faq.answer: The Paid Internship at Defence Laboratory Jodhpur is a contractual position. This means the internship will be for a fixed duration as specified by the organization.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Defence Laboratory Jodhpur located?
faq.answer: Defence Laboratory Jodhpur is located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, with the pincode 342011. The internship will be conducted at this location.

faq.question: Q9. When will the selected candidates be informed?
faq.answer: Selected students will be intimated by 25th June 2026. This will allow candidates to make necessary arrangements before the internship commencement date.

faq.question: Q10. When does the internship program start?
faq.answer: The Paid Internship program at Defence Laboratory Jodhpur is scheduled to commence on 01st July 2026. Candidates should be prepared to join on this date.
